name: FAA Form 7140-1 Interactive Walkthrough
description: Step-by-step interactive guide to completing FAA Form 7140-1

form_sections.title: Section 1: General Information
form_sections.description: Basic information about the laser operation

fields.label: 1a. To (FAA Service Center)
fields.help_text: Select the service center for the operation location. See Appendix E of AC 70-1B.

fields.label: 1b. From (Proponent)
fields.help_text: The proponent is the party primarily responsible for laser safety.

fields.label: 1c. Event or Facility Name
fields.help_text: Use a descriptive name that clearly identifies the operation.
fields.example: July 4th Celebration Laser Show - Central Park

fields.label: 1d. Date Prepared
fields.help_text: Date the form is being completed, NOT the event date.

fields.label: 2a. Testing and Alignment
fields.help_text: Include setup, alignment, and testing time. Add buffer for contingencies.

fields.label: 2b. Operation
fields.help_text: Actual show times. Be specific about time zone.

fields.label: Brief Description of Control Measures
fields.help_text: Describe methods to protect airspace: observers, electronic systems, physical barriers.

templates.name: Safety Observers
templates.text: Safety observers will be positioned at [locations] with continuous radio contact to the laser operator. Observers are trained in aircraft identification and emergency shutdown procedures.

templates.name: Electronic Protection
templates.text: Electronic protection system compliant with SAE AS6029B will monitor airspace using [radar/camera description]. System automatically terminates beams when aircraft detected.

templates.name: Physical Termination
templates.text: All laser beams terminate on physical structures [describe buildings/screens] that are inaccessible to aircraft. Beam paths verified clear of navigable airspace.

fields.label: 11a. Site Elevation
fields.help_text: Use USGS topographic maps or GPS. Enter in feet mean sea level.

fields.label: 11b. Laser Height Above Site
fields.help_text: Height from ground to laser aperture. Include any stage/structure height.

fields.label: 11c. Overall Laser Elevation
fields.help_text: Automatically calculated from 11a + 11b

fields.label: 11e. Latitude
fields.help_text: Degrees, minutes, seconds. Use GPS or topographic map.

fields.label: 11f. Longitude
fields.help_text: Degrees, minutes, seconds. Use GPS or topographic map.

fields.label: Power (CW) / Average Power (Pulsed)
fields.help_text: Enter maximum power in watts. For RGB, enter per wavelength.

fields.label: Beam Divergence
fields.help_text: Full angle at 1/e points in milliradians.

fields.label: Wavelength(s)
fields.help_text: Enter all wavelengths. For RGB: list all three.

fields.label: 12b. MPE Value
fields.help_text: Use Table 1 (pulsed) or Table 2 (CW) from Appendix B of AC 70-1B.

fields.label: 12c. Pre-corrected Power (PCP)
fields.help_text: Sum of all visible wavelengths.

fields.label: Visual Correction Factor
fields.help_text: Use Table 3 or calculated value for multi-wavelength.

fields.label: Visually Corrected Power
fields.help_text: PCP × VCF

fields.label: 14a. NOHD (Nominal Ocular Hazard Distance)
fields.help_text: Distance where beam irradiance falls below MPE.

fields.label: 14b. SZED (Sensitive Zone Exposure Distance)
fields.help_text: Distance where irradiance falls below 100 µW/cm².

fields.label: 14c. CZED (Critical Zone Exposure Distance)
fields.help_text: Distance where irradiance falls below 5 µW/cm².

fields.label: 14d. LFED (Laser-Free Exposure Distance)
fields.help_text: Distance where irradiance falls below 50 nW/cm².
